system.powerDescription:
You transform your body into an amalgamation of flesh and sin, becoming a partial-imago in the process. Pick one of these effects with your transformation:

• You fuse with one or more of your mundane weapons, increasing their CAT by +1 (up to CAT 4) and making them able to harm sins.

• Your flesh deforms into one similar to an actual sin. All your mundane abilities are no longer hard by default while fighting sins.

• You tap into your sin-seed tumor for more power. Your mundane abilities increase by +1 CAT.

You can take 1d3 sin to pick a second option, and 1d6 sin to pick all three options. This is chosen upon activation.
